chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 07 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For orders on CMA No.89/2026 (151 CPC) 13.02.2026 Mr. Lareb Nawaz Ansari, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant PG for the State along with Inspector Manzoor Ali, SDPO, Bhiria and Inspector Muhammad Aslam Leghari, SHO PS Bhiria Road, SIP Lal Dino Shar, SHO PS Bhiria and SIP Ghulam Murtaza Gorchani, SHO PS Tharushah >>>>>..<<<<< This petition already been disposed of in terms of the order dated 24.02.2025. Today, the police functionaries are present and have submitted that they are proceeding in accordance with the Police Rules, 1934, for tracing the absconding accused. In view thereof, it is the prerogative of the police to follow the procedure prescribed under the law and to take necessary steps for the arrest of the accused. Consequently, the listed application is hereby dismissed. The police are under an obligation to submit their progress report before the learned trial Court in accordance with the law. The petitioner, if so advised, may also approach the learned trial Court regarding the arrest of the accused and for seeking further appropriate directions. JUDGE ARBROHI
